queue_item.action: Create a falsifiable acoustic challenge-response protocol that attributes device-meter detections to a specific browser audio run.

progress.finding: Fresh randomized time-frequency sequences provide stronger causal attribution than undifferentiated sound detection during a test window.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should generate entropy with crypto.getRandomValues inside the direct user gesture, schedule the challenge to the declared destination, expose the challenge packet in runtime evidence, and score a synchronized external meter trace. Keep listener perception as a separate observation.

non_overwrite_note: This append-only queue update does not replace operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json or another team's records.
